name: ranbval-sdk
description: Keep API secrets out of plaintext config: layered .ranbval* env files, decrypt vault tokens only when used, optional usage telemetry — minimal deps, your own HTTP/SDK stack.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile=dist/index.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/index.js', '/*! ranbval-sdk - Apache-2.0 - https://www.npmjs.com/package/ranbval-sdk */\n' + require('fs').readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8'))"

author: Ahsan Tariq, Hussnain Tariq, Sundas Tariq
